summary: The commenter suggests that ASTP/ONC should consider evolving FHIR APIs to align with graph query standards like ISO 39075. This alignment would enhance relationship-aware interoperability and enable returning context graphs while maintaining REST-based interoperability.
key_arguments: Aligning FHIR APIs with graph query standards will improve interoperability by supporting relationship-aware data queries.
Using ISO 39075 can enable returning context graphs, enhancing data context and usability.
Maintaining REST-based interoperability ensures compatibility with existing systems.
recommendations: ASTP/ONC should incorporate or consider ISO 39075 graph query standards in evolving FHIR API requirements.
notable_quote: ASTP/ONC should look at the evolution of FHIR APIs to align with graph query standards, such as ISO 39075.
